title: modiola caroliniana
intro: Modiola caroliniana, also known as Carolina creeper, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Modiola caroliniana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
